target_audience: Self-employed professionals and small business owners aged 32-55 in Tennessee who have been told by traditional banks they don't qualify for a mortgage despite strong income

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Big banks denying you because your tax returns show write-offs that hide your real income
pain_points_solutions.solution: Bank statement loan programs that qualify you on 12 or 24 months of deposits instead of W2s or tax returns

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Loan officers who vanish after you submit your application and leave you wondering for weeks
pain_points_solutions.solution: Direct cell phone access to your broker plus weekly status updates until the day of close

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Rate quotes that magically go up right before closing
pain_points_solutions.solution: Locked-rate guarantee in writing the day you apply — the rate you see is the rate you close at

offer: Free 15-minute self-employed qualification review — know exactly how much home you can buy before you start shopping
risk_reversal: No upfront fees, no commitment, no credit pull required for the initial review
guarantees: Locked-rate guarantee, on-time close guarantee or we credit you $1,000 at closing
discounts: Waived processing fees for first-time Northbridge clients
lead_magnet: The Self-Employed Homebuyer Playbook: 9 loan programs banks won't tell you about
top_stats: Closed over $480M in loans for self-employed borrowers since 2015
Access to 74 lenders including private money and non-QM specialists
Average close time: 21 days versus industry average of 43
service_area: Nashville, Franklin, Brentwood, and all of Tennessee
